name: obsidian-second-brain
description: Comprehensive Obsidian vault manager for PARA organization, daily workflows, OKR tracking, knowledge synthesis, and thinking analysis

vault_path.title: Obsidian vault path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (e.g. /Users/you/Documents/Vault). Used by all obsidian commands and agents.

daily_notes_folder.title: Daily notes folder
daily_notes_folder.description: Folder within the vault where daily notes live (relative to vault root, e.g. '2 - Areas/Daily Ops/Daily Notes')
